title: hemizonia increscens subsp. foliosa
intro: Hemizonia increscens subsp. foliosa, also known as California dwarf sunflower, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hemizonia increscens subsp. foliosa include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
